svg.text: How large companies build LLM training datasets

g.text: Define task type · target model · output schema · quality rubric · format preference (JSONL / CSV)
Synthetic generation via LLM · web scraping · domain expert templates · few-shot seeding
Persona sampling · difficulty distribution (easy/medium/hard) · style variation
Length checks · perplexity scoring · language detection · toxicity filter
Format validation · schema conformance · completeness check
Factual accuracy scoring · instruction-following check · coherence & relevance
Preference ranking · confidence labelling (Confirmed / Likely / Hypothesis)
Exact-match dedup · near-dedup (MinHash / SimHash) · overlap ratio check · canonicalization
JSONL (OpenAI / Anthropic / HuggingFace chat format) · CSV with headers
Train / val / test splits · metadata fields · example count reporting
Auto-generated data card (Hugging Face format) · category / domain / size / splits
Generation method · known biases · version + timestamp · license
Validated JSONL / CSV + data card + stats report
